name: Dulce De Mange (Mango Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel ripe mangoes and remove the flesh to make enough for 2 cups of mango puree.
2. Scrape the puree into a saucepan.
3. Add 2 cups of white sugar and 1 tablespoon of lime juice to the saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens enough that you can see the bottom of the saucepan beneath the spoon.
5. Pour the mixture into a prepared mold (a cake or loaf tin works well).
6. Allow it to cool completely.
7. When cooled, turn out the mango paste onto a plate.
8. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
This recipe was published in "Raw Materials" by Meryl Constance in The Sydney Morning Herald on February 18, 1993.
